properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v5 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I come out of agreement With the lie that You have left me on my own I am not alone I come out of agreement With the worry and the fear I've come to know No, they won't have a hold on me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Protector You never, never, never let me go You said You wouldn't leave me, and You won't You're right by my side Protector

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I come into agreement With the truth that You are who You say You are I can trust Your heart I come into agreement With what Heaven has declared over my life 'Cause I know that You fight for me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Protector You never, never, never let me go You said You wouldn't leave me, and You won't You're right by my side Protector You hide me in the shadow of Your wings Your presence is my peace, my covering My song in the night Protector, ooh-ooh Protector

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: No weapon, no worry will prosper against me No darkness, no evil will tease or torment me No weapon, no worry will prosper against me No darkness, no evil will tease or torment me All power, dominion to one name is given My fortress, my freedom, my refuge, my Jesus All power, dominion to one name is given My fortress, my freedom, my refuge, my Jesus

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Protector You never, never, never let me go You said You wouldn't leave me, and You won't You're right by my side Protector You hide me in the shadow of Your wings Your presence is my peace, my covering My song in the night Protector, oh-ooh Protector

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I believe it, I believe it, yes You are who You say You are You never ever leave, You never ever leave, no Let that faith rise up in us tonight Let that faith rise up in us tonight, as Fear is broken up, as fear falls away As worry is silenced At the sound of Your name tonight, Jesus Oh, oh, oh

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Protector You never, never, never let me go You said You wouldn't leave me, and You won't You're right by my side Protector You hide me in the shadow of Your wings Your presence is my peace, my covering My song in the night Protector, oh Protector, ooh Protector
